name: Nakamoto Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Nakamoto Inc., a Delaware corporation, is a Bitcoin company building a global portfolio of Bitcoin-native companies. We hold Bitcoin on our balance sheet and, through our ecosystem-wide presence, seek to provide investors with exposure to Bitcoins global growth and to leverage our treasury to acquire and develop an ecosystem of Bitcoin companies across finance, media, advisory and more.
